S4 · Claude Code memory surfaces
CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules, auto-memory, skills

span.p:
S5 · Anthropic API
Haiku rank + extract

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R1: Invokes slash-commands and writes prompts that trigger skill auto-invocation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R2: Loads skill markdown, executes hooks (`SessionStart`, `UserPromptSubmit`, `PostToolUse`), invokes `engram` binary subcommands

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R3: Ranks memory/skill/auto-memory candidates and extracts snippets during recall; classifies feedback/facts during learn

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R4: Discovers and reads CLAUDE.md (+ `@`-imports), `.claude/rules/*.md`, auto-memory topic files, and skill frontmatter for ranking

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R5: Reads and writes Engram's own feedback/fact TOML; reads/writes the cached binary

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: R6: Returns briefings (`/prepare`), recall results (`/recall`), and hook reminders that re-enter the agent's context
